title: dolichos vexillatus
intro: Dolichos vexillatus, also known as the Flag-stemmed Horse Bean, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The medicinal properties of Dolichos vexillatus include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the treatment of kidney stones and urinary tract infections. Dolichos vexillatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
